2347450.name: Heroes Stand Tall: M.E.T.A
2347450.description:
"Heroes Stand Tall: M.E.T.A" is a simple first-person arena shooter built using Unreal Engine and marketplace assets. Created as a personal project, it was developed to learn the full process of making and releasing a game on Steam.

Set in a fast-paced PvP arena, players could choose from a small set of characters and weapons to compete in short, intense death matches. The focus was on core shooting mechanics, quick movement, and getting hands-on experience with FPS game design.

This game is no longer in active development and will be removed from the store. It served as a valuable learning experience and a first step into game development.
2347450.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
